text: Dashboard table rows appeared very tall with blank space in text-only cells (Project/Customer, Product/Region). Root cause: the Actions column had 4 buttons stacked vertically (flex-col), each ~36px, totalling ~168px minimum row height. Fix: changed Actions column to grid-cols-2 layout so 'Formulario' and 'Subir docs' sit side-by-side, reducing row height roughly by half. 'Ver expediente' and 'Descargar ZIP' span full width (col-span-2).
issue: Blank space / tall rows in dashboard table
